channel.title: Over on Tech Tracker
channel.description: Recent content in Over on Tech Tracker

item.title: Over - A new level AR metaverse to discover new things worldwide.
item.description: <img src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/-3kJrdP_-nCo/Y82LJ8dyuAI/AAAAAAAAQc4/Rtk2q8K-2TguJGj85M3IGlo69jj8eiyPgCNcBGAsYHQ/s1600/1674414884889949-0.png" alt=""> VR aka virtual reality and AR aka augmented reality are two revolutionary technologies which though has long history starting from year 1960s but only from last one decade VR and AR got huge spotlight as now in 20th century we have many modern technologies and electronic devices like PCs and smartphones to right on support VR and AR which is why many developers and companies over the years constantly updating and upgrading VR and AR to improve and extend it’s capabilities so that we can use them extensively.
